memberdef.definition: typedef void co_rpdo_ind_t(co_rpdo_t *pdo, co_unsigned32_t ac, const void *ptr, size_t n, void *data)
memberdef.argsstring: (co_rpdo_t *pdo, co_unsigned32_t ac, const void *ptr, size_t n, void *data)
memberdef.name: co_rpdo_ind_t

briefdescription.para: The type of a CANopen Receive-PDO indication function, invoked when a PDO is received or an error occurs.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Receive-PDO service.
the SDO abort code: 0 on success, or CO_SDO_AC_NO_OBJ, CO_SDO_AC_NO_SUB, CO_SDO_AC_NO_WRITE, CO_SDO_AC_NO_PDO or CO_SDO_AC_PDO_LEN on error.
a pointer to the bytes received.
the number of bytes at ptr.
a pointer to user-specified data.

memberdef.definition: typedef void co_rpdo_err_t(co_rpdo_t *pdo, co_unsigned16_t eec, co_unsigned8_t er, void *data)
memberdef.name: co_rpdo_err_t

briefdescription.para: The type of a CANopen Receive-PDO error handling function, invoked in case of a timeout or length mismatch.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Receive-PDO service.
the emergency error code (0x8210, 0x8220 or 0x8250).
the error register (0x10).
a pointer to user-specified data.

briefdescription.para: Returns the alignment (in bytes) of the co_rpdo_t structure.
Returns the size (in bytes) of the co_rpdo_t structure.
Creates a new CANopen Receive-PDO service.

detaileddescription.para: The service is stopped after creation and SHOULD be started with co_rpdo_start() before use.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a CAN network.
a pointer to a CANopen device describing the server.
the PDO number (in the range [1..512]). The PDO communication and mapping parameter records MUST exist in the object dictionary of dev.

simplesect.para: a pointer to a new Receive-PDO service, or NULL on error. In the latter case, the error code can be obtained with get_errc().

briefdescription.para: Destroys a CANopen Receive-PDO service.
Starts a Receive-PDO service.
Stops a Receive-PDO service.
Returns true if the specified Receive-PDO service is stopped, and false if not.
Returns a pointer to the CAN network of a Receive-PDO.
Returns a pointer to the CANopen device of a Receive-PDO.
Returns the PDO number of a Receive-PDO.
Returns a pointer to the PDO communication parameter record of a Receive-PDO.
Returns a pointer to the PDO mapping parameter record of a Receive-PDO.
Retrieves the indication function invoked when a Receive-PDO error occurs.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Receive-PDO service.
the address at which to store a pointer to the indication function (can be NULL).
the address at which to store a pointer to user-specified data (can be NULL).

briefdescription.para: Sets the indication function invoked when a Receive-PDO error occurs.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Receive-PDO service.
a pointer to the function to be invoked.
a pointer to user-specified data (can be NULL). data is passed as the last parameter to ind.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the error handling function of a Receive-PDO service.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Receive-PDO service.
the address at which to store a pointer to the error handling function (can be NULL).
the address at which to store a pointer to user-specified data (can be NULL).

briefdescription.para: Sets the error handling function of a Receive-PDO service.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Receive-PDO service.
a pointer to the function to be invoked.
a pointer to user-specified data (can be NULL). data is passed as the last parameter to err.

briefdescription.para: Triggers the actuation of a received synchronous PDO.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to a Receive-PDO service.
the counter value (in the range [0..240]).

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or -1 on error. In the latter case, the error code can be obtained with get_errc().

briefdescription.para: Requests the transmission of a PDO.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, or -1 on error. In the latter case, the error code can be obtained with get_errc().

briefdescription.para: This header file is part of the CANopen library; it contains the Receive-PDO declarations.

detaileddescription.para:
